set terminal pngcairo; set output 'fa_test.png'
ox = (-5629499534213120. / 1125899906842624.)
dx = (5629499534213122. / 288230376151711744.)
oy = (5279123486343167. / 288230376151711744.)
dy = (4731248119114456. / 4503599627370496.)
set xrange [] noextend
plot '-' using (ox+dx*$1):(oy+dy*$2):(oy+dy*$3) notitle with filledcurves
